findings.title: US Treasury operationalizes beneficial ownership filing amid real estate vulnerabilities
findings.summary: Treasury has implemented BO information filing system and proposed rules targeting residential real estate and investment advisers for AML gaps. Affects AML pillar via professional enablers and BO opacity. Actor A2 (professional enablers) highlighted in regulatory gaps.

findings.title: FinCEN severs Huione Group from US system over Southeast Asia scam laundering
